Who We Are

Refined
Products.
Indian Roots.

Jayexim is a Vadodara-based product company with two focused lines — industrial packaging solutions and premium millet-based nutrition. Our products are built to international standards and supplied to global buyers with full quality control, complete documentation, and dependable communication at every step.

Our Position

Focused Products.
Global Standards.

Our approach is deliberately focused. We have built deep product capability in two areas where Indian quality and pricing offer genuine global advantage — packaging and millet nutrition.

Every product is sampled before commitment. Every shipment leaves with complete documentation. Every enquiry is answered within 24 hours.

We operate for international buyers who value reliability — and who expect a product company to perform professionally at every step.

This consistency is our operating standard. Not a selling point.

01
Quality Consistency

The sample you approve is the product that ships — no substitution, no quality drift between orders.

02
Transparent Pricing

Competitive, clear, and honest. Our pricing reflects the quality we produce — no hidden margins.

03
Long-Term Relationships

Our buyers return because we perform consistently, season after season. Built for the long term.

Two Product Lines

Two Categories.
One Partner.

01
Jayexim Packaging

Export-grade tapes, stretch films, and corrugated packaging — built for logistics, manufacturing, and e-commerce markets worldwide.

02
Jayexim Millet Snacks

Premium millet-based nutrition products — snack bars, breakfast range, and healthy snacks for health-conscious global markets.

03
Direct. Always.

You deal with Jayexim directly — clear communication, faster decisions, better pricing. Always.

04
Vadodara, Gujarat

Located in India's industrial and agricultural heartland — access to premium raw materials and manufacturing infrastructure.

Product Segment One

Jayexim
Packaging

Export-grade industrial packaging solutions — precision-built for global logistics, manufacturing, and e-commerce markets.

Our Packaging Range

Built for
Global Standards.

BOPP Self Adhesive Tapes
  • Transparent BOPP Tape — all widths
  • Brown / Buff BOPP Tape
  • Colour BOPP Tape
  • Heavy Duty BOPP Tape
  • Machine Grade Tape
  • Low Noise Tape
Printed Tapes
  • Custom Printed Tape — full branding
  • Warning & Fragile Printed Tape
  • Tamper Evident VOID Tape
  • Barcode / Batch Printed Tape
  • Multi-Colour Branding Tape
Paper Tapes
  • Self-Adhesive Kraft Tape
  • Water Activated Kraft Tape
  • 100% Recyclable — Eco-Friendly
  • Printed Kraft Tape available
Stretch Films
  • Hand Stretch Film — all microns
  • Machine Stretch Film
  • Pallet Wrapping Film
  • Pre-Stretched Film available
Reinforced Tapes
  • Mono Filament Tape
  • Cross Filament Tape
  • Masking Tape
  • Heavy-duty reinforcement options
Corrugated Boxes
  • Single, Double & Triple Wall
  • Export Cartons — all dimensions
  • Custom Printed Boxes
  • Industrial Shipping Boxes
  • Packaging Rolls & Sheets

Product Segment Two

Jayexim
Millet Snacks

Better-for-you millet-based nutrition — premium clean-label snacks and breakfast products designed for health-conscious global markets.

Our Foods Range

Ancient Grains.
Modern Nutrition.

Muesli & Breakfast Range
  • Honey & Nuts Muesli
  • Fruit & Nuts Muesli
  • Almond Choco Crunch Muesli
  • Jowar Flakes — Sorghum Millet
  • Roasted Bajra Flakes — Pearl Millet
  • Roasted Ragi Flakes — Finger Millet
Healthy Snacks
  • Millet Protein Puffs — 3 flavours
  • Millet Crispy Crackers — 3 flavours
  • Ragi Sticks — 3 flavours
  • Baked, Not Fried
  • Gluten-Free options available
On-The-Go Snack Bars
  • Millet & Oats Bar — Berry, Almond, Chocolate
  • Millet Nuts & Seeds Bar
  • Cereal Bars — Cranberry, Orange
  • No Artificial Flavours
  • High Fibre · Source of Energy

All our millet products are available for private label and custom packaging. Minimum order quantities available — contact us for full product specifications and pricing.

Our Capability

Global
Capability

What We Deliver

Every Step,
Handled Well.

◈
Export Coordination

End-to-end shipment management — from production readiness to port dispatch, coordinated with full transparency.

◈
Private Label Support

Custom branding, packaging formats, and label specifications available across both product segments.

◈
Complete Documentation

Commercial invoice, packing list, certificate of origin — all export paperwork handled from our side, every time.

◈
Quality Assurance

Every product quality-checked before dispatch. Sample approval is mandatory before any bulk shipment proceeds.

◈
Shipment Flexibility

Sea freight, air cargo, or express courier — logistics coordinated to your port or door globally.

◈
Dependable Communication

Every enquiry answered within 24 hours. Every order status communicated proactively — professional, always.

How We Work

From Enquiry
to Delivery

1
Share Requirement

Product, quantity, destination, timeline — via WhatsApp, email, or LinkedIn.

2
Receive Quote

Full FOB or CIF pricing with complete cost breakdown within 24–48 hours.

3
Sample Approval

Product samples dispatched for approval before any bulk order is confirmed.

4
Shipment

Quality check, complete documentation, and coordinated shipping to your destination.

The India Advantage

Why Source
from India?

India offers exceptional product quality, competitive pricing, and deeply established export infrastructure. Our location in Gujarat places us at the heart of India's industrial and agricultural production base.

#1
India is the world's largest millet producer — our nutrition range draws from its finest growing regions
40%
Lower packaging costs vs Western alternatives with comparable or superior quality standards
100+
Countries importing from India — a proven, trusted global production base
Fast
Competitive lead times to GCC, Europe, Southeast Asia, and North America
